stack: C++, Linux, Python, Bash, Computer Vision, Embedded Systems
points_positifs: Poste basé à Singapour (objectif géographique principal)
Stack technique aligné : C++, vision par ordinateur, systèmes embarqués
Contexte produit hardware/software concret avec impact sportif
points_negatifs: 3 ans d'expérience requis contre 1.5 ans réel (mais niveau Associate)
Pas de mention du télétravail ou flexibilité
commentaire: Poste de Software Engineer C++ à Singapour chez Rapsodo. Malgré l'exigence de 3 ans d'expérience, le niveau Associate et la stack (C++, computer vision) correspondent bien au profil d'Aodren, notamment son expérience en eye-tracking chez EXAIL.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Software Engineer role at Rapsodo. Your work with computer vision in sports analytics connects directly with my recent experience building an eye-tracking system.

I currently write C++ and JavaScript for a robotics product at EXAIL. I redesigned our installation process there. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours. That's an 85% reduction, and anyone on the team can run it.

I also built ValoFenua, a real estate platform that scrapes 1,300+ listings daily and runs an AI agent for price estimation. It taught me end-to-end product development, from data pipelines to user interface.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. Rapsodo's use of real-time data to improve athletic performance is exactly the kind of practical engineering I want to work on.

Aodren Gloux

stack: Python, AI tools (LLMs, automation tools), n8n
points_positifs: Entry level parfaitement adapté au profil junior (0-1.5 ans)
Fort accent sur l'automatisation et les outils IA (n8n, LLMs)
Environnement fintech régulé MAS avec focus sur l'innovation
Opportunité de croissance en IA appliquée dans un secteur financier
Accepte les candidats avec peu d'expérience formelle mais forte capacité analytique
points_negatifs: Profil académique cible très orienté Maths/Physique (vs Ingénierie Informatique)
Pas de mention de visa sponsorship (nécessaire pour un Français)
commentaire: Poste Entry Level idéal pour Singapour avec un focus rare sur l'IA appliquée et l'automatisation. L'expertise concrète d'Aodren en workflows n8n, agents IA et Python correspond exactement au besoin de MetaComp, malgré un profil académique plus technique que théorique.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the AI Engineer role at MetaComp. Your work bridging traditional finance and digital assets through AI-driven automation caught my attention, particularly the focus on building practical solutions for real business use cases.

I build systems where AI handles the heavy lifting. At EXAIL Robotics, I cut deployment time by 85%, reducing a 2-day process to 2 hours using automated scripts. On my own time, I developed ValoFenua, a real estate platform that runs a daily scraper collecting 1,300+ listings and feeds them into an n8n workflow with AI agents that calculate live price estimates from market data. I also built an autonomous job search pipeline using Python, n8n, and LLM integrations. These are concrete implementations of AI solving business problems, not just research experiments.

I'm completing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering with a strong foundation in statistics and optimization. I work with Python daily and I'm comfortable moving from theoretical models to production code quickly.

Aodren Gloux

commentaire: Poste Entry Level idéal pour le profil technique (C++, Java) et l'objectif géographique Singapour, mais risque majeur sur l'obtention du visa puisque Shopee priorise les candidats locaux.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Backend Engineer role on your Marketplace Promotion team. I'm particularly interested in working on systems that handle vouchers and flash sales at scale.

I currently develop core features in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics, including an eye-tracking system. I also redesigned our installation process. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time.

On my own time, I built ValoFenua, a real estate platform that runs a daily scraper processing 1,300+ listings. The system uses PostgreSQL for data storage and generates PDF reports on demand. It handles concurrent data processing and user authentication via Supabase.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering in 2026. Working on Shopee's promotion mechanisms would be a great way to apply my backend skills to high-traffic marketplace systems.

Aodren Gloux
